title: Ai trading prompts
author: VariationThen4756
selftext:
Good day everyone, hope all is well. 
I would like to know  in prompt engineering I understand the bigger the prompt the better to split but in trading building a strategy (pine script) what is the best way to achieve quality respond when the Ai is generating the script. I'm new to trading and to Ai engineering. 


Much appreciated 🙏

comments.author: staskh1966
comments.body:
I'm not sure that "big prompt" is a proper approach when you are doing in-depth research—depending on your platform, you may quite quickly clutter your context window - once you above 30-50% you are getting a lot of hallucinations; over 50% - answers are not reliable at all.  
Consider using "skills"—a newer approach just introduced in Claude and adopted by many other AI agents. Please check my open-source project [https://github.com/staskh/trading\_skills](https://github.com/staskh/trading_skills) \- works with Claude Code/Cursor, but you can get almost all functionality inside of free Claude Desktop as well.
